{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "Berit Global Limited is an indigenous Company and dully registered under the Corporate Affairs Commission of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. Berit Global Limited is a wholly owned Nigerian company with a team of highly dedicated and professional staff skilled in providing specialized and integrated services to the Oil and Gas sector, Power sector, Energy sector, FMCGs, Industrial Engineering Services and Building Services.

Our proven and quality service delivery is second to none in the areas of Front End Engineering Design (FEED), Detailed Engineering Design (DED), Basic Engineering Design (BED), Drafting and As-Built Design, Procurement and Supply, Construction, Project Management, Manpower Supply, Installation, Commissioning, Decommissioning, Maintenance and Sales.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced marketer to supervise daily support operations of our company and plan the most efficient administrative procedures.
	You will lead a team of professionals to complete a range of administrative duties in different departments.
	A great marketer has excellent communication and organizational skills.
	The ideal candidate will be well-versed in departmental procedures and policies and will be able to actively discover new ways to do the job more efficiently.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;beritgloballimited.ng@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Marketer Job at Berit Global Limited




        
    

        
        Berit Global Limited is an indigenous Company and dully registered under the Corporate Affairs Commission of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. Berit Global Limited is a wholly owned Nigerian company with a team of highly dedicated and professional staff skilled in providing specialized and integrated services to the Oil and Gas sector, Power sector, Energy sector, FMCGs, Industrial Engineering Services and Building Services.

Our proven and quality service delivery is second to none in the areas of Front End Engineering Design (FEED), Detailed Engineering Design (DED), Basic Engineering Design (BED), Drafting and As-Built Design, Procurement and Supply, Construction, Project Management, Manpower Supply, Installation, Commissioning, Decommissioning, Maintenance and Sales.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced marketer to supervise daily support operations of our company and plan the most efficient administrative procedures.
	You will lead a team of professionals to complete a range of administrative duties in different departments.
	A great marketer has excellent communication and organizational skills.
	The ideal candidate will be well-versed in departmental procedures and policies and will be able to actively discover new ways to do the job more efficiently.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Loan Recovery Officer",
  "description": "B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in swift and effection recovery of their bad-debt.

We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We used use skilled and experienced recovery agents to support loan agencies, using multiple communication channels such as SMS, phone calls and emails to remnf and encourage customers to fulfil their repayment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abule&nbsp;Egba, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Good communication skills.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Salary
N100,000 - N180,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Bfreedomoutsourcing@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Loan Recovery&quot;&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more inquiries, WhatsApp: 0704035181.",

Loan Recovery Officer Job at B-Freedom Outsourcing




        
    

        
        B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in swift and effection recovery of their bad-debt.

We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We used use skilled and experienced recovery agents to support loan agencies, using multiple communication channels such as SMS, phone calls and emails to remnf and encourage customers to fulfil their repayment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer

Job Location: Abule Egba, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Good communication skills.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Salary
N100,000 - N180,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Loan Recovery"  as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more inquiries, WhatsApp: 0704035181.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketing Director Job at Berit Global Limited




        
    

        
        Berit Global Limited is an indigenous Company and dully registered under the Corporate Affairs Commission of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. Berit Global Limited is a wholly owned Nigerian company with a team of highly dedicated and professional staff skilled in providing specialized and integrated services to the Oil and Gas sector, Power sector, Energy sector, FMCGs, Industrial Engineering Services and Building Services.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our proven and quality service delivery is second to none in the areas of Front End Engineering Design (FEED), Detailed Engineering Design (DED), Basic Engineering Design (BED), Drafting and As-Built Design, Procurement and Supply, Construction, Project Management, Manpower Supply, Installation, Commissioning, Decommissioning, Maintenance and Sales.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Director

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced marketing director to supervise daily support operations of our company and plan the most efficient administrative procedures.


Responsibilities


	You will lead a team of professionals to complete a range of administrative duties in different departments.


 Requirements


	A great administration manager has excellent communication and organizational skills.
	The ideal candidate will be well-versed in departmental procedures and policies and will be able to actively discover new ways to do the job more efficiently.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales and Marketing Personnel",
  "description": "At BeachFront Diagnostics, our mission is to deliver high-quality diagnostic services that empower healthcare providers with the critical information they need to make informed decisions about patient care. We are committed to excellence, accuracy, and innovation in every test we conduct.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Personnel

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a dynamic, result-oriented Sales and Marketing Personnel to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving patient volume, expanding our corporate client base, and strengthening our team.
	If you have a passion for healthcare marketing, excellent relationship-management skills, and a track record of driving revenue growth, we want to hear from you.


Key Reponsibilities


	Corporate Client Acquisition: Identify and secure new corporate retainerships, school health plans, and HMO partnerships for the hospital.
	Relationship Management: Maintain and nurture relationships with existing corporate clients, community leaders, and referral doctors to ensure repeat business.
	Market Activation &amp; Events: Plan and execute healthcare activations, medical outreaches, and wellness checks to increase hospital visibility.
	Digital Marketing &amp; Content: Manage the hospital&rsquo;s social media platforms and online presence to showcase our clinical expertise and surgical facilities.
	Competitor Analysis &amp; Reporting: Track market trends, patient feedback, and competitor services to advise management on pricing and service expansion.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Experience: Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of active sales/marketing experience, preferably in a hospital or HMO setting.


Skills:


	Proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Digital Marketing (Canva, Social Media management, Email marketing).


Attitude:


	Self-motivated, aggressive yet ethical in sales approach, and a great team player.


What We Offer


	Salary: N200,000 / Month + performance-based commissions.
	A structured and professional working environment.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@beachfrontdiagnostics.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales and Marketing Personnel Job at BeachFront Diagnostics




        
    

        
        At BeachFront Diagnostics, our mission is to deliver high-quality diagnostic services that empower healthcare providers with the critical information they need to make informed decisions about patient care. We are committed to excellence, accuracy, and innovation in every test we conduct.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Personnel

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dynamic, result-oriented Sales and Marketing Personnel to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving patient volume, expanding our corporate client base, and strengthening our team.
	If you have a passion for healthcare marketing, excellent relationship-management skills, and a track record of driving revenue growth, we want to hear from you.


Key Reponsibilities


	Corporate Client Acquisition: Identify and secure new corporate retainerships, school health plans, and HMO partnerships for the hospital.
	Relationship Management: Maintain and nurture relationships with existing corporate clients, community leaders, and referral doctors to ensure repeat business.
	Market Activation & Events: Plan and execute healthcare activations, medical outreaches, and wellness checks to increase hospital visibility.
	Digital Marketing & Content: Manage the hospital’s social media platforms and online presence to showcase our clinical expertise and surgical facilities.
	Competitor Analysis & Reporting: Track market trends, patient feedback, and competitor services to advise management on pricing and service expansion.


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Experience: Minimum of 2–3 years of active sales/marketing experience, preferably in a hospital or HMO setting.


Skills:


	Proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Digital Marketing (Canva, Social Media management, Email marketing).


Attitude:


	Self-motivated, aggressive yet ethical in sales approach, and a great team player.


What We Offer


	Salary: N200,000 / Month + performance-based commissions.
	A structured and professional working environment.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
